changelog: 8.5.4 — HOTFIX: 2_Follow_Whale.py — NameError _hengky_lbl: newline hilang antara komentar dan assignment akibat W-9 refactor

8.5.3 — HOTFIX: director_agent — KeyError 'whale_vol_multiplier': REGIME_DEFAULTS pakai key 'whale_vol_mult' tapi caller expect 'whale_vol_multiplier'; fix semua key di REGIME_DEFAULTS (2 instance) + base_vol_mult reference

8.5.2 — FIX: audit lanjutan Page 01/02/03 — 8 weakness fixed: [P03-X1] SL terlewat case (pct_to_sl≤0 → 🚨 SL TERLEWAT); [P03-X2] TP2 + holding days di position card (3-col grid); [P03-X3] smooth loading single spinner; [P02-X1] Tab 1 sort selectbox tidak render saat best kosong; [P02-X2] smart_list prioritaskan OB/VP zone; [P02-X3] control_score badge di whale_card ROW 1; [P01-X2] pre-flight gate ringan di inline log trade; [P01-X3] RS min threshold slider di ALL SETUPS

8.5.1 — FIX: audit Page 01/02/03 — [P01-W1] tp1_price di-pass ke log_trade() dari inline card; [P02-W1] Tab 6: tambah Ctrl+OB/VP columns, expand sort ke 7 options; [P02-W2] Tab 1 BEST LONG: sort toggle (Conviction/Floor/Ctrl/Vol); [P02-W3] Tab 5 DISTRIBUSI: sort toggle + copy tickers; [P02-W4] sector_breakdown rebuild dari live whale_results (tidak stale); [P02-W5] positive_signals weighted (defending+ctrl=2pt, rest=1pt); [P03-W1] NEAR TP1 visual: biru=trim, hijau=hold; [P03-W2] holding_days_est dari actual entry_date

8.5.0 — FEAT: director_agent Sesi B — _analyze_whale_performance upgrade: baca 6 field baru (whale_quality/control_score/ob_zone/vp/pengeringan/free_float/sector); quality_score 0-10; grade dari kualitas bukan hanya jumlah; fix _bench_data_feed kosong

8.4.9 — FEAT: director_agent Sesi C — auto-threshold data-driven: _derive_optimal_thresholds() cari min_score optimal dari historical WR per regime; EMA + whale patch diganti data-driven (fallback ke hardcoded jika data <10 trades); fix merge error _bench_data_feed

8.4.8 — REWRITE: learning_agent V3 — statistical inference dari trade history: analisis single dimension (regime/grade/risk/holding), kombinasi 2-dimensi prediktif, systematic leak detection, derived rules konkret → lessons.md actionable

8.4.7 — FEAT: 6_Trade_Journal — Tab Paper vs Real (Unified View): compare paper trade (journal_agent) vs real trade (trade_logger) per grade-bucket; derive grade dari signal_score; slippage check; insight generator otomatis

8.4.6 — FEAT: 4_Stock_Analysis — Pre-Flight Checklist: 8 kriteria wajib (regime/EMA score/conviction/floor dist/risk%/vol/sinyal arah/EMA signal) sebelum LOG PAPER TRADE — tombol disabled jika belum pass, override button untuk force entry

8.4.5 — FEAT: 5_Alert_Watch — prioritize posisi aktif: [AW-1] posisi banner di atas page (saham yang di-hold + status ⚡/👁/·); [AW-2] alert posisi aktif tampil di tier teratas dengan badge entry+P&L+%toSL; [AW-3] tab label tunjukkan jumlah posisi aktif yang alert/watch; [AW-4] split: POSISI AKTIF → ALERTS UNIVERSE → WATCHLIST

8.4.4 — FEAT: Loss Attribution Post-Mortem — [PM-1] get_loss_attribution() di trade_logger: per-trade breakdown (regime/score/risk/MCF) + pattern match dari historical losses + rule suggestion; [PM-2] Tab POST-MORTEM di Page 06: auto-show setelah close trade, per-trade card + aggregate win rate by regime/score/risk

8.4.3 — REWRITE: 3_Money_Flow.py → War Room (Position Command Center) — [WR-1] Pre-Market Briefing: regime verdict + regional market data (IHSG/Nikkei/HSI/S&P/DXY); [WR-2] Position Health Monitor: traffic light 3-5 posisi, fetch harga real-time, % ke SL/TP1, EMA check; [WR-3] Exit Signal Watch: surface exit_engine.py ke UI — SL_HIT/EMA_BREAK/TRAIL_HIT/TIME_STOP/VOL_COLLAPSE/TP_HIT; [WR-4] Performance Tracker footer: closed trades stats, win rate, expectancy

8.4.2 — UPGRADE: Page 01 + 02 — [P01-A] min score + max risk filter di breakout section + copy tickers; [P01-B] inline log trade per breakout card (tidak perlu pindah ke Page 06); [P02-A/B/C] sort toggle di tab Pengeringan/AT Floor/Recovery; [P02-D] Tab 7 onboarding card step-by-step cara dapat Stockbit token

8.4.1 — FIX: 3_Money_Flow.py — [MF-1] key mismatch pct_52w_high→pct_from_52w_high (52W% label salah); [MF-2] min_value_bn pass ke constructor bukan direct attr (adapt_to_market() override); [MF-3] ganti get_dynamic_universe()+.JK ke get_catalyst_universe() (konsisten Page 02); [MF-4] hapus dead variable vol_ma

8.4.0 — FIX: whale_scanner — [W-7] estimate_floor_price: ganti support_cluster (pd.cut fragile) dengan VP VAL; VP dihitung dulu di pipeline sebelum floor; [W-8] sector map: full-ticker lookup + 2-char prefix fallback, 0% OTHER di IDX watchlist (dari 72%)

8.3.9 — FIX: 2_Follow_Whale + whale_scanner — 9 bugs: [W-1] CSS var() opacity suffix invalid, [W-2] conviction boost sebelum compute_conviction, [W-3] nested f-string di 3 tempat, [W-4] classify_whale_quality tidak pakai control_score/OB/VP, [W-5] recovery signal false positive tanpa whale evidence, [W-6] ex-div filter buang panic+defend setup, [W-9] session_state panel double-init
